Previewing and whitelisting in controlled environments

Team management and administrative roles with defined Security Groups
Consumption (Read) and Management (Write) APIs for integrating with custom business workflows

Used for rapid UI iteration and localisation without store resubmission cycles

Operational oversight and client success management via dedicated Program Managers
